text:
Created attachment 208062
shar file

Hello,
I'm proposing to add facebook-python-business-sdk [1] python package to the ports tree, if you feel it could be a good addition.

I'm attaching both shar file and port testing to this bug: this can be disregarded if devel/py-curlify [2] is not being added to the ports.

[1] https://github.com/facebook/facebook-python-business-sdk
[2] https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=241037

Let me know if there's anything else you need form me.
Thank you,
Alessandro
